failures.message: The active Kubernetes context k3d-amof does not have the Argo CD ApplicationSet/Application CRDs required to register gmd-dev/test/prod.
The expected cloud-dev kubeconfig exists but exposes no usable contexts, so live cloud Argo/DNS verification cannot proceed from this workspace.
No gmd public hostname, ingress, or Cloudflare DNS receipt exists for the golden dev environment.
The current non-demo release lifecycle deploy path is AMOF-stack-oriented; gmd needs an explicit Argo registration/readback path before AMOF can own this golden delivery flow.

next_action: Provision or point AMOF at a Kubernetes context with Argo CD ApplicationSet support, define the gmd dev live URL/DNS contract, then rerun UP8-GOLDEN-GMD-001 from the preserved Director input.
